reviews.comment:
Excelente relación precio producto. Habitaciones limpias. Amplias. Muy buena atención y buen desayuno. Un punto en contra es que no anda bien el WiFi

(Translated by Google)
Excellent value for money. Clean and spacious rooms. Very good service and a good breakfast. One drawback is that the Wi-Fi doesn't work well.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3528909386919944725/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzMnBULUp3EAE

reviews.comment:
Un buen lugar para parar , comimos muy ricas minutas y pudimos descansar en un lugar limpio y cómodo. Tiene Lugar para guardar el vehículo y ofrecen un desayuno completo. Súper recomendable .

(Translated by Google)
A great place to stop; we had delicious sandwiches and were able to rest in a clean and comfortable place. They have parking and offer a full breakfast. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3528909386919944725/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzZ3I3bnVnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Súper recomendable, hicimos una parada en nuestro viaje y nos encontramos con excelente comida y un lugar agradable para descansar, limpio y tranquilo.

(Translated by Google)
Highly recommended. We made a stop on our trip and found excellent food and a pleasant, clean, and quiet place to rest.

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar de paso. La habitación más que correcta, la ducha es un placer. El restaurante excelente en relación precio-calidad. Desayuno aceptable. Volvería sin dudas. Socios ACA tienen descuentos.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place to stop over. The room was more than adequate, and the shower was a delight. The restaurant was excellent value for money. Breakfast was acceptable. I would definitely return. ACA members get discounts.

reviewReply.comment: Buenos días muchas gracias por su calificacion
